rationale: Correct domain framing with multiple concrete finite-to-infinite analogies and a clear proof-planning methodology, but lacks calibrated confidence markers, explicit assumption ledger, and does not surface where the analogy strategy might fail.
rubric_evidence: replace 'square' by a structural hypothesis such as closed range plus surjectivity
basis becomes dense span or orthonormal basis, rank/image becomes range/closed range
The proof plan is complete when every finite-dimensional shortcut has a named infinite-dimensional substitute theorem
